system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Meditation against TN 7
Type: Normal
Qi: 1

You enter a standing meditation and your fingertips glow brightly. On a Success you grow sharp luminous claws that resemble jade. In addition to normal Damage these do 1 Extra Wound on all Damage rolls from Arm Strike Attacks (including other Kung Fu Techniques). The effect lasts for 1 round +1 per Rank of Neigong. This special Technique requires payment to the ghosts in blood. Every round it is in effect that you do not do Damage the five ghosts drain a point of your Hardiness (returns 1 point per hour). Cathartic: The claws do 2 Extra Wounds. This increases to 3 Extra Wounds at Qi Rank 4 and increases again to 5 Extra Wounds at Qi Rank 6.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.catharticEffect: The claws do 2 Extra Wounds. This increases to 3 Extra Wounds at Qi Rank 4 and increases again to 5 Extra Wounds at Qi Rank 6.
